skill.summary: Bitcoin L1 wallet for agents - check balances, send BTC, manage UTXOs. Extends to Stacks L2 (STX, DeFi) and Pillar smart wallets (sBTC yield).

latestVersion.changelog:
- chore(main): release 1.26.0 (#176)
- feat(inbox): allow inbox message resubmission with confirmed txid as payment proof (#183)
- fix(inbox): make send_inbox_message resilient to stale relay dedup (#181)
- fix: Add relay health monitoring and nonce gap detection (#174)
